overall settings.description: Under Main Setup (shortcut key M), browse the Pre-built Scenarios. Or, continue a previously saved game by clicking Upload. Saving frequently is recommended. To start from scratch, go to Scenario Settings and describe your idea, along with a title. Next, add a few initial items or characters. More can be set up as the game goes along. Your AI can provide lists of choices like a tabletop manual, or use it to add details such as a real-world description of iron.
overall settings.title: Generic Adventure
